title: Orange Telecom powers its digital future with KubeDB
tagline:
Orange Telecom powers its digital future with
KubeDB
description: From manual legacy databases to fully automated, production-grade DBaaS on Kubernetes. Faster deployments, zero-downtime operations, enterprise-grade resilience, and complete data sovereignty.
company_note: One of the world's largest telecommunications operators serving millions of customers across Europe, Africa, and the Middle East with advanced 5G, edge, and digital services.
customer_description: One of the world's largest telecommunications operators serving millions of customers across Europe, Africa, and the Middle East with advanced 5G, edge, and digital services.
value_props_description: Same experience as cloud DBaaS - but with full control, any cloud, any storage, and no lock-in.
compliance_note: Open-core · Apache 2.0 · Certified on OpenShift, Rancher, EKS, AKS, GKE & more
comparison_description: Orange moved from manual, on-premises database operations to fully automated Kubernetes-native DBaaS powered by KubeDB.

comparison_rows.previous: Legacy relational DBs (MySQL, Oracle, PostgreSQL) with manual ops
comparison_rows.current: Fully automated provisioning, scaling, backup & recovery with KubeDB
Horizontal & vertical scaling without downtime via KubeDB OpsRequests
Self-service via Kubernetes-native CRDs and custom internal UI

comparison_rows.previous: High manual effort, higher costs & risk
comparison_rows.current: Automated lifecycle, reduced ops overhead, developer self-service
Incremental, encrypted, deduplicated backups with KubeStash
Automatic failover, multi-AZ replication, and health monitoring

challenge_title: Legacy databases couldn't keep pace with 5G demands
challenge_key_pains: Slow provisioning · Manual scaling · Operational risk · Backup complexity · Governance gaps
challenge_summary: Legacy databases couldn't keep pace with 5G demands - manual provisioning, scaling, backups, and upgrades created bottlenecks.

challenge_items.title: Monolithic legacy DBs
challenge_items.description: Oracle, MySQL, PostgreSQL running on bare metal or VMs with manual everything.

challenge_items.title: Slow deployment cycles
challenge_items.description: Ticket-based provisioning delayed new services and 5G network functions.

challenge_items.title: Operational risk
challenge_items.description: Manual backups, no automated failover, limited governance.

benefits_description: Production-grade DBaaS with KubeDB automating full database lifecycle on Kubernetes with zero-downtime operations.
benefits_items_title: Key KubeDB Benefits Realized by Orange

benefits_items.title: Self-Service Provisioning
benefits_items.description: Developers and teams provision production-ready databases in minutes using Kubernetes-native CRDs and a custom internal UI, no more tickets.

benefits_items.title: Zero-Downtime Operations
benefits_items.description: Automated horizontal/vertical scaling, upgrades, and failover with KubeDB OpsRequests ensure 24/7 availability for telco workloads.

benefits_items.title: Enterprise Data Protection
benefits_items.description: KubeStash provides incremental, encrypted, deduplicated backups with point-in-time recovery to any object store.

benefits_items.title: Full Governance & Security
benefits_items.description: RBAC, TLS management, network policies, and Transparent Data Encryption give platform teams centralized control while maintaining developer agility.

timeline.title: Evaluation & Selection
timeline.description: Orange engaged AppsCode to build Database-as-a-Service on Kubernetes. KubeDB selected after rigorous evaluation.

timeline.title: Integration & Testing
timeline.description: Lab validation, load testing, security audits, and close collaboration with KubeDB engineering team. Custom UI and Ansible automation developed.

timeline.title: Production Rollout
timeline.description: KubeDB handed over to production DevOps teams. Multiple database engines now running as self-service, governed services.

timeline.title: Ongoing Scale
timeline.description: KubeDB continues to power Orange's cloud-native applications with automated operations, resilience, and full governance.

results_metrics.label: Automated DB lifecycle
results_metrics.note: Provisioning, scaling, backups, upgrades, and failover automated by KubeDB

results_metrics.label: Manual operations
results_metrics.note: Manual database operations eliminated across production workloads

results_quote: From manual legacy databases to fully automated, production-grade DBaaS with complete data sovereignty and enterprise resilience.

value_props.title: Kubernetes-native at carrier scale
value_props.description: GitOps-driven database management that scales with 5G traffic demands.

value_props.title: Zero-downtime everything
value_props.description: Automated failover, rolling upgrades, and live scaling without service interruption.

value_props.title: Enterprise compliance & sovereignty
value_props.description: Multi-tenant RBAC, encrypted backups, and full data residency control.

cta_title: Ready to modernize your database operations?
cta_description: Deploy production-grade databases on any Kubernetes platform - with the same automation Orange relies on for its mission-critical telco services.
